texto: Some stories are easy to follow, and easy to tell. There is an introduction, a twist, and a happily-ever-after. And when telling the story, everyone forgets those small details, like that one quiet morning when the two of you woke wake up with the sunrise and talked about cookies. Or that night when she had her period, and the cramps were killing her, and she just needed your hug and something warm.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Andrea Tomić: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “Some stories are easy to follow, and easy to tell. There is an introduction, a twist, and a happi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, couple, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de bom-dia e boa-noite.

frase_original: Some stories are easy to follow, and easy to tell. There is an introduction, a twist, and a happily-ever-after. And when telling the story, everyone forgets those small details, like that one quiet morning when the two of you woke wake up with the sunrise and talked about cookies. Or that night when she had her period, and the cramps were killing her, and she just needed your hug and something warm.
